definitions.neutralSituation: Offensive plays with down in {1,2,3,4}, quarter in {1,2,3}, and absolute score differential <= 8 at snap.
definitions.garbageTimeExclusion: Excluded only for early-down rates: 4th quarter plays with absolute score differential > 16.
definitions.successRate: Standard success rule: gain >=40% of yards-to-go on 1st down, >=60% on 2nd down, and 100% on 3rd/4th down.
definitions.driveSustainRate: Share of offensive drives with at least one first down.
definitions.redZoneTdEfficiency: Offensive touchdowns scored on drives that reached the red zone divided by total red-zone drives.
definitions.paceSecondsPerPlay: Median seconds between consecutive offensive snaps for a team in a game, excluding deltas <=0 or >45 seconds. Omitted if required timing fields are unavailable.

notes: Fewer than 250 offensive plays in sample.
Fewer than 250 offensive plays in sample.
